# Project Alpha Specifications
Project Alpha is a high-performance RAG system designed for enterprise cross-document correlation.
Target Completion: Q4 2026.
Lead Architect: Dr. J. M.
Key Features: GraphRAG, Semantic Chunking, Multi-modal support.
Files for this project are located in `tests/fixtures/demo_project/`.
Refer to `results.csv` for the latest benchmarks.
